purpose: External evidence for platform persons that remain missing from Reep people.csv/names.csv.
rules: This file does not resolve Reep mappings and must not change match_status from missing.
Use it only to preserve verified external provider clues for future Reep refreshes or second-source identity mapping.
Each entry must include platform_person_id, evidence_status, provider_refs, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, and evidence.

evidence: Platform official FIFA roster row has Haiti midfielder context.

Reep 2026.17 people.csv and names.csv contain no matching row or alias for Woodensky Pierre, so the Reep mapping remains missing.
